Transforms into a swift Grape Bat when the green bar is full. As a bat, Vampire Cookie can pass through obstacles, earning Evasion Points, but must keep flapping his wings to stay above the ground. Occasionally extracts Grape Juice Drops from obstacles to restore HP, but HP drain is faster. (Leveling up makes the gauge fill faster.) (slot 1)

(Butter Tiger counts as a riding skill.) (slot 1)

The green gauge charges over time. When it is full, Lemon Cookie generates an Electro Shield, increasing Jelly points and slightly slowing HP drain. Periodically creates a Tennis Ball Jelly that can be picked up to smash using a double jump. The ball then bounces around crushing obstacles and creating Orange Citrus Jellies. While in the air, the Slide button turns into a Smash button. Tapping it triggers an even stronger bounce. Frantically smashes tennis balls while in Blast Mode. (Leveling up increases the frequency of tennis balls appearing.) (slot 1)

The green gauge charges over time. When it is full, Onion Cookie enters a Haunted House. Passes through obstacles earning Evasion Points while in the house. (Leveling up makes the gauge fill faster.) (slot 1)

Transforms into a swift Grape Bat when the green bar is full. As a bat, Vampire Cookie can pass through obstacles, earning Evasion Points, but must keep flapping his wings to stay above the ground. Occasionally extracts Grape Juice Drops from obstacles to restore HP, but HP drain is faster. (Leveling up makes the gauge fill faster.) (slot 4)

The green gauge charges over time (the lower the HP, the faster). When it is full, Werewolf Cookie changes into wolf form to crush obstacles, earning Crush Points. Careful: Werewolf Cookie can still fall into pits while in wolf form. (Leveling up makes the gauge fill faster and increases the amount of Crush Points.) (slot 3)

The green gauge charges over time. When it is full, Cream Puff Cookie casts a Minor Jelly Spell to create a small amount of Jellies. Sometimes this triggers a Jelly Storm, generating a large amount of Jellies. (Leveling up makes the gauge fill faster.) (slot 5)

The green gauge charges over time. When it is full, Cinnamon Cookie performs various card tricks. Dazzles with Revival Magic when running out of HP once. (Leveling up makes the gauge fill faster.) (slot 1)

Sliding charges two gauges. Standing up when the small gauge is full crushes nearby obstacles. Standing up when the big gauge is full triggers Blast Mode for a short distance. At the end of Blast Mode, obstacles in a large area are crushed. All obstacles crushed by White Choco Cookie's skill turn into White Choco Jelly. The small gauge fills faster at higher running speed. (slot 1)

A water gauge appears above Herb Cookie's head. Rain and Sun Jellies appear periodically. Picking up Rain Jellies causes rain, filling up the water gauge. When the gauge is full, picking up a Sun Jelly brings out the sun to turn regular Jellies into Sprout Jellies. Slower HP drain. (Leveling up makes Rain and Sun Jellies appear more frequently.) (slot 1)

A water gauge appears above Herb Cookie's head. Rain and Sun Jellies appear periodically. Picking up Rain Jellies causes rain, filling up the water gauge. When the gauge is full, picking up a Sun Jelly brings out the sun to turn regular Jellies into Sprout Jellies. Slower HP drain. (Leveling up makes Rain and Sun Jellies appear more frequently.) (slot 2)
Increases HP recovery from potions (up to 29%).
Slows HP drain (up to 17%).

(Leveling up makes the gauge fill faster.) (slot 3)

Periodically transforms Jellies into three types of Flower Jellies that fill the flower gauge. When the gauge is full, Princess Bari Cookie enters the forest of the Sacred Tree to banish spirits to the afterlife, leaving behind Spirit Jellies. Banishing a giant spirit yields a Healing Water Jelly that restores HP and triggers Blast Mode. Healing Water Jellies do not count as HP Potions. (Leveling up increases Flower Jelly Points.) (slot 8)

Periodically casts his fishing rod to crush obstacles and collect Fish Jellies. Occasionally sits down on a lotus leaf to fish for a Big Fish Jelly. Slower HP drain while sitting on the lotus leaf. (slot 1)

Creates magnetic aura which also serves as a shield (slot 2)

The green gauge charges over time. When it is full, Moonlight Cookie falls asleep and dreams. Periodically transforms Jellies into three types of Flower Jellies that fill the flower gauge. When the gauge is full, Princess Bari Cookie enters the forest of the Sacred Tree to banish spirits to the afterlife, leaving behind Spirit Jellies. Banishing a giant spirit yields a Healing Water Jelly that restores HP and triggers Blast Mode. Healing Water Jellies do not count as HP Potions. (Leveling up increases Flower Jelly Points.) The green gauge charges over time. When it is full, Hero Cookie puts on his Caramel Syrup Suit for a flying Blast with magnetic effect and slower HP drain. (slot 3)

Small chance of crushing obstacles on collision instead of taking damage. When his rage gauge is filled, he's on fire and crushes all obstacles. Revives out of sheer willpower after running out of HP once. Earns extra Crush Points. (Leveling up increases the amount of HP on Revive.) (slot 3)

Catching flying White Kimchi Rolls attaches talismans to surrounding obstacles to make it possible to pass them for Evasion Points. Collecting a certain number of White Kimchi Rolls summons Cabbage Spirits that can be passed through for Evasion Points. (Leveling up increases Evasion Points.) (slot 1)

Catching flying White Kimchi Rolls attaches talismans to surrounding obstacles to make it possible to pass them for Evasion Points.
